MINI MINUTES FOR APR-15-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO SET ASIDE VACATE AN ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER OF DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED "MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT" THAT WOULD WARRANT SETTING ASIDE THE JUDGMENT. (CCP SEC. 473(B).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SANDY CARRANZA #7062. (302)

OBJECTION TO PLTF'S MTN TO VACATE ORDER SUSTAINING DEMUR FILED BY DEFENDANT BABANOVA, VERA SHUM, YUMI

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE VACATE, AN ORDER FOR DEMURRER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS IS CONTINUED TO MAY 14, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 15, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Set Aside Vacate, An Order For Demurrer Sustaining Defts
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SEGLENDA CRIGLER, 415.545.3855, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
BRADLEY RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS YUMI SHUM AND VERA BABANOVA.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S (Amended) Motion To Set Aside Vacate An Order Sustaining Demurrer Of Defendants is denied. Plaintiff has not established "mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect" that would warrant setting aside the judgment. (CCP sec. 473(b).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

(Amended) Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Set Aside Vacate, An Order For Demurrer Sustaining Defts
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SEGLENDA CRIGLER, TEL. NO. 545-3855, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER's Motion To Set Aside Vacate, An Order For Demurrer Sustaining Defendants is continued to May 14, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 15, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRADLEY RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS VERA BABANOVA & YUMI SHUM; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS VERA BABANOVA & YUMI SHUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
